flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Wilberforce University are 28% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($38.3k vs $53.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Wilberforce University rose 27% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.9k → $26.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wilberforce University rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.2k → $16.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 16 pp at Wilberforce University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (16.0% vs 31.5%).
